title: Reporting a security incident (current)
text: Reporting a security incident: open a ticket with the Security Operations Center, record the time of detection, and notify your manager. Status: current authoritative version.

title: Reporting a security incident (2019, deprecated)
text: Reporting a security incident: open a ticket with the Security Operations Center, record the time of detection, and notify your manager. (2019, deprecated)

title: Escalating a security breach (current)
text: Escalating a security breach: use the severity matrix, page the on-call incident commander for Sev-1, and convene the response bridge. Status: current authoritative version.

title: Escalating a security breach (restricted, contains PII)
text: Escalating a security breach: use the severity matrix, page the on-call incident commander for Sev-1, and convene the response bridge. (restricted, contains PII)

title: Preserving evidence after a security incident (current)
text: Preserving evidence after a security incident: do not power off affected hosts, capture memory and disk images, and maintain chain of custody. Status: current authoritative version.

title: Preserving evidence after a security incident (legal hold)
text: Preserving evidence after a security incident: do not power off affected hosts, capture memory and disk images, and maintain chain of custody. (legal hold)

title: Preserving evidence after a security incident (EU edition)
text: Preserving evidence after a security incident: do not power off affected hosts, capture memory and disk images, and maintain chain of custody. EU regional edition.

text: Submitting an expense claim: enter the report in the portal, attach receipts, and route to your approver. Status: current authoritative version.

text: Submitting an expense claim: enter the report in the portal, attach receipts, and route to your approver. (2019, deprecated)

text: Records retention periods: minimum retention by record category including financial, HR, and contractual records. (2019, deprecated)

title: Office Coffee Service
text: Office Coffee Service. Office coffee and pantry service: machine locations, restocking schedule, and barista hours.

text: Parking Lot Map. Campus parking: lot assignments, EV charging stalls, and overflow parking guidance.

title: Gym Membership Perk
text: Gym Membership Perk. On-site gym and wellness perk: hours, class booking, and locker assignment.

text: Cafeteria Menu Policy. Cafeteria menu rotation, dietary labeling, and allergen disclosure.

text: Desk Booking System. Hot-desk booking: reserve a desk, check-in window, and neighborhood zones.

title: Mail Room Hours
text: Mail Room Hours. Mail room: package pickup hours, courier drop-off, and oversized item handling.

title: Recycling Guidelines
text: Recycling Guidelines. Recycling and waste sorting: bin colors, compost rules, and e-waste days.

title: Conference Room AV
text: Conference Room AV. Conference room AV: connecting a laptop, booking a room, and reporting AV faults.

text: Company Swag Store. Internal swag store: ordering branded merchandise and redemption points.

text: Wellness Webinars. Monthly wellness webinars: schedule, registration, and recordings.
